EXPLANATION: No article with this exact title and author combination exists; the citation appears to be a hallucination found only in the reference lists of other papers, which likely propagated from AI-generated text. While the named authors are prominent NMR researchers, they have not co-authored a paper with this title in *Natural Product Reports*.
